fields.TopBottomRotation: How to Rotate the top and bottom images to fit.
fields.PosX: What to use for the positive X side.
fields.NegX: What to use for the negative X side.
fields.PosY: What to use for the positive Y side.
fields.NegY: What to use for the negative Y side.
fields.PosZ: What to use for the top side.
fields.NegZ: What to use for the bottom side.

methods.OnCreate: Tells the creator to create the cubemap.
